creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is not passing completely on Redports:

https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140728223442-87577/

FreeBSD 10/i386 and 11/i386 are failing.

FreeBSD amd64 is passing (all 4) and FreeBSD 8/i386 and FreeBSD 9/i386 is passing


If the i386 can't be fixed on the current FreeBSD, we should set ONLY_FOR_ARCH or something I guess...
